before_prompt: Dated 1980s colonial home interior: worn oak parquet floors, outdated avocado-green kitchen cabinets, popcorn ceilings, brass fixtures, narrow doorways, low-wattage incandescent lighting, cramped layout — wide-angle lens, natural morning light, slightly desaturated
after_prompt: Same floor plan completely transformed: white oak wide-plank floors, open-concept kitchen with quartz island, 10-foot ceilings, recessed LED lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows, modern fireplace, clean sightlines — architectural photography, bright, airy, luxury residential

scene_timeline.scene: before — wide exterior shot of dated colonial
transition — construction wipe sweep revealing new interior
after — slow dolly through transformed open-plan living
detail shots — kitchen quartz, flooring, custom millwork, lighting
cta overlay — aerial pull-back of finished home exterior

transition_style: Horizontal wipe with construction dust particle effect — before on left, after revealed right
camera_motion: Slow steady dolly forward through rooms; gentle crane rise on exterior; macro pull-focus on material details
caption: Whole House Renovation — AI concepts delivered in 3-5 days
editing_instructions: Color grade: warm golden tones in after sequence (LUT: warm daylight), cool-grey desaturation in before
Cut on movement: match-cut from before doorway to after open-plan reveal at frame edge
Add subtle ambient audio: construction fade-out, then airy interior room tone — no music, no narration

before_prompt: Suburban ranch house circa 1975: faded beige aluminum siding, mismatched windows, overgrown shrubs, cracked driveway, rusted gutters, flat uninspiring facade — overcast lighting, slightly flat perspective from street
after_prompt: Same home, dramatic transformation: board-and-batten dark charcoal siding, black casement windows, horizontal hardwood garage door, statement front door in terracotta, curated drought-tolerant landscaping, modern concrete driveway — golden-hour side-lighting, crisp editorial photography

scene_timeline.scene: before — static street-level shot of dated facade
transition — vertical wipe from ground up, materials transforming
after — slow parallax push toward transformed front entrance
detail shots — siding texture, window profile, door hardware, landscaping
cta overlay — wide view of completed exterior at dusk

transition_style: Ground-up vertical wipe — concrete to siding to roofline, synchronized with material change
camera_motion: Tripod lock-off on before; smooth slider push-in on after; drone rise to reveal full facade at end
caption: Exterior Upgrade — Curb appeal concept in 3-5 days
editing_instructions: After sequence: heavy warm grade with lifted shadows, increased saturation on landscaping greens
Before sequence: desaturate 30%, reduce contrast slightly to emphasize dull quality
End on a 2-second hold of the after facade before CTA text fades in

before_prompt: Cramped 1990s galley kitchen: laminate wood-grain cabinets, dropped fluorescent ceiling panel, linoleum floor, dated tile backsplash, side-by-side fridge blocking natural light, cluttered counters — realistic residential photo, slightly unflattering overhead lighting
after_prompt: Same footprint, open concept transformation: floor-to-ceiling white shaker cabinets, waterfall quartz island with seating, pendant lighting, herringbone marble backsplash, professional range, wide plank white oak floors — bright editorial kitchen photography, window backlighting

scene_timeline.scene: before — wide shot of old kitchen from doorway
transition — counter-level wipe across surface, materials transforming
after — tracking shot along island, revealing full kitchen
detail shots — pendant drop, quartz edge, cabinet hardware, backsplash tile
cta overlay — pull-back to lifestyle shot with soft bokeh

transition_style: Counter-surface horizontal wipe — old laminate swept away by quartz reveal at countertop level
camera_motion: Smooth gimbal tracking shot along island length; macro detail inserts with shallow depth-of-field
caption: Kitchen Remodel — AI-generated concept with full cost estimate
editing_instructions: Warm white balance (5500K) for after sequence — evoke magazine-quality warmth
Before sequence: slightly increase noise/grain, reduce warmth to emphasize age
Sound design: subtle clink of glass, faint morning ambience — no music required

before_prompt: Dated master bathroom: pink-beige tile from 1985, brass towel bars, cultured marble vanity top, jetted tub with dated surround, low frosted window, water-stained grout — honest residential photo with flat bathroom lighting
after_prompt: Same bathroom, spa-level transformation: floor-to-ceiling large-format porcelain tile, floating walnut vanity with vessel sink, freestanding soaking tub, frameless glass shower with linear drain, heated towel rail, backlit mirror — soft warm lighting, luxury hotel aesthetic

scene_timeline.scene: before — static wide shot from bathroom doorway
transition — shower glass wipe effect — tiles replacing tiles
after — slow pan revealing vanity, tub, shower in sequence
detail shots — tile grout lines, brushed nickel fixtures, tub filler, mirror lighting
cta overlay — soft fade to white with text

transition_style: Tile-replacement morph — old tiles digitally regrout and reface into new porcelain, left to right
camera_motion: Smooth pan left to right on tripod head; pull-focus from tile to fixture; end on wide room reveal
caption: Bathroom Remodel — Spa-quality concepts in 2-4 days
editing_instructions: Desaturate before footage to near-monochrome; restore warm saturation in after sequence
After sequence: add subtle bloom/glow around light sources for luxury feel
Keep total runtime under 20 seconds — cut detail shots to 1.5s each max

before_prompt: 1,200 sq ft suburban home with small side yard — dated siding, visible constraints, cramped rear exterior, no deck or outdoor connection, original footprint clearly defined — aerial-angle shot from slightly elevated position, overcast sky
after_prompt: Same home with seamlessly integrated 600 sq ft addition: new primary suite wing, transitional-style architecture matching original, covered outdoor living space, new landscaping connecting old and new — drone aerial shot, sunny golden-hour light, material continuity

scene_timeline.scene: before — aerial view of original home footprint
transition — blueprint/outline animation showing addition in plan view
after — drone reveal of completed addition from multiple angles
detail shots — interior of addition, connection to original, outdoor space
cta overlay — pull-back aerial showing full expanded property

transition_style: Blueprint ghost-lines animation — floor plan appears, then 3D mass model, then photo-real reveal
camera_motion: Drone orbital flight around original home; transition to interior dolly through new addition; reverse drone pull-back on completed project
caption: Home Addition — Feasibility concept with permit scope in 3-5 days
editing_instructions: Animate floor plan lines drawing in at 2x speed during blueprint transition (3-6 sec)
Use HDR drone footage at golden hour for maximum impact on after sequence
Cut to interior detail shots at exact beat of ambient audio — keep rhythm tight at 2s per shot

before_prompt: Raw vacant lot or teardown property: overgrown grass, no structures, survey stakes visible, neighboring homes on either side, concrete sidewalk — realistic aerial-adjacent wide shot from street elevation, flat overcast morning light
after_prompt: Fully realized modern home on same lot: clean craftsman or transitional-style architecture, two-story, attached two-car garage, curated front landscaping, modern windows, metal-accent roof detail, exposed concrete driveway — bright afternoon light, sharp architectural photography

scene_timeline.scene: before — wide shot of empty lot from street level
transition — site plan drawn in animation with lot lines and footprint
after — architectural exterior reveal from multiple angles
detail shots — exterior material samples, window profiles, entry sequence, interior renders
cta overlay — final hero exterior shot at dusk with warm lighting

transition_style: Site plan animation: lot boundaries appear, building footprint draws in, then 3D rendering materializes over real photo
camera_motion: Street-level tripod for before; slow drone rise during transition; cinematic orbital around finished home; end on dramatic dusk wide
caption: New Construction — Site concept and feasibility in 5-7 days
editing_instructions: Animate site plan with subtle architectural drawing sound effects — pencil on paper, not distracting
After exterior: ensure sky replacement with dramatic golden-hour gradient if source footage is flat
Run 10px 'AI-generated concept' disclosure text at bottom throughout after sequence

before_prompt: Stack of disorganized permit paperwork on a kitchen table: confusing government forms, multiple department application packets, red stamp 'DENIED', confused homeowner at table — warm residential setting, natural light, realistic
after_prompt: Clean digital dashboard showing permit approval status: green checkmarks across all permit types, jurisdiction map with approval zone highlighted, PDF download ready, clean modern UI on laptop screen, homeowner looking confident and relieved — bright modern home office

scene_timeline.scene: before — close-up on messy permit stack and stressed expression
transition — papers digitize and animate into clean UI screens
after — permit dashboard with green status indicators loading
detail shots — individual permit cards, jurisdiction overlay, download button
cta overlay — clean laptop screen with dashboard on desk

transition_style: Paper-to-screen digital morph — physical documents dissolve into matching digital permit cards
camera_motion: Tight close-up on paper before; smooth zoom-out during transition revealing screen; slow pan across dashboard details
caption: Permits & Approvals — Know exactly what you need before you build
editing_instructions: Use screen-recording style animation for the permit dashboard reveal — mimics SaaS product demo
Add subtle UI sound design: soft keyboard clicks, success 'ding' on green checkmarks
Keep pacing fast — this is a functional value-prop video. 15 seconds max.

before_prompt: Empty blank page or whiteboard — minimalist frame, clean white background, faint pencil sketch lines barely visible, person holding pencil looking uncertain — soft studio lighting, abstract aesthetic
after_prompt: Fully rendered AI-generated room concept appearing on screen in real-time: living room materializes from particles/pixels, design elements composing — photorealistic render at final frame, warm residential setting, architectural visualization quality

scene_timeline.scene: before — blank canvas or rough sketch on white background
transition — AI generation animation: pixels/particles forming structure
after — final photorealistic AI concept render revealed room by room
detail shots — material tiles generating, color swatches appearing, floor plan preview
cta overlay — final concept image with Kealee branding

transition_style: AI generation particle effect — dots aggregate from random positions into coherent room elements, ending on photo-real render
camera_motion: Slow push in on blank canvas; zoom into 'generation zone'; pull back dramatically on completed render reveal
caption: AI Concept & Design — From description to photorealistic render in minutes
editing_instructions: Particle generation effect: 2-3 seconds max using After Effects particle simulator or equivalent
Final render reveal: quick fade with upscale zoom from 80% to 100% scale — feels like resolution increasing
Color grade: cool neutral before sequence, warm amber grade on final render reveal for aspirational impact
